/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/fishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/fishbot_interfaces/srv/detail/oledcontrol__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/fishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/fishbot_interfaces/msg/detail/motorcontorl__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hell0/esp32_car2/extra_packages/build/fishbot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
